transcription.text: Initialize sequence. At Computer Renaissance, we deal in solutions. Our newest solutions sell around 500 megahertz, 8.4 gigabyte hard drive, 64 meg RAM, 17 inch monitor, keyboard, mouse, CD-ROM, sound card, speakers, Windows 98 second edition, plus MS Works preloaded. Your choice of a Lexmark printer or scanner. Free Tri-Cities internet access, plus a one year warranty for only $999.99. We sell upgrade and service systems in 250 stores nationwide. Computer Renaissance, where computers are our only business. For more information, visit us at www.computer-reallocations.com. Thank you.
